title: BEM-1150 provider runners
objective:
Create file governance/runners/provider_activation.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REGISTRY = Path("governance/providers/providers_registry.json")
POLICY = Path("governance/providers/contour_provider_policy.json")


def provider_for_contour(contour):
    providers = {p["id"]: p for p in json.loads(REGISTRY.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("providers", [])}
    policies = json.loads(POLICY.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("policies", [])
    for item in policies:
        if item.get("contour") == contour:
            primary = item.get("primary")
            return {"ok": primary in providers, "contour": contour, "provider": primary, "provider_meta": providers.get(primary)}
    return {"ok": False, "error": "contour policy missing"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    result = provider_for_contour(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "")
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
Create file governance/runners/provider_failover.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

POLICY = Path("governance/providers/contour_provider_policy.json")


def failover_for_contour(contour, mode):
    policies = json.loads(POLICY.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("policies", [])
    for item in policies:
        if item.get("contour") == contour:
            fallback = item.get("fallback")
            allowed = item.get("fallback_allowed_only_for")
            if fallback == "mock" and mode != allowed:
                return {"ok": False, "error": "mock fallback allowed only for mock_e2e"}
            return {"ok": True, "contour": contour, "fallback": fallback}
    return {"ok": False, "error": "contour policy missing"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    contour = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
    mode = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""
    result = failover_for_contour(contour, mode)
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
